title: lomaria procera
intro: Lomaria procera, also known as the fern of the Andes, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lomaria procera include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Lomaria procera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
